case_title: USA CHECKS CASHED, INC VS BRICK HOUSE MANAGEMENT, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,324.00 FILED BY USA CHECKS CASHED, INC AS TO DEFENDANT BRICK HOUSE MANAGEMENT, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-05-2000 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
